pageContext.name: Hatsune Miku
pageContext.description: Frame Music Girls Hatsune Miku has been turned into a robot! In a collaboration between Kotobukiya's original Frame Arms series and Hatsune Miku, Frame artist Hatsune Miku comes to life.  The design for this model was created by Takayuki Yanase based on the previously released Frame Music Girl Hatsune Miku designed by Humikane Shimada.  Brand new molds were used to realize this model's design, which has not been seen before in the Frame Arms lineup. Don't miss your chance to add this model kit to your collection today!  *Frame Architect is not included in this model kit.
